meaning: effect [物]珀耳帖效应(塞贝克效应
examples: This so-called Peltier effect also helps cool electronic device such as laptops.
The Peltier effect can be used to create a refrigerator which is compact and has no circulating fluid or moving parts;
The aim was to produce a textile cooling element, based on the Peltier effect, which could be operated via a DC voltage.
Take advantage of the Peltier's thermoelectric cooling properties to keep the Gorilla Glass from melting.
Youngsters Lee Peltier and Danny Guthrie were given European debuts and Jerzy Dudek was recalled in goal.
